title: auto-payment uses DEFAULT_MAINNET_ENDPOINTS[0] directly, bypassing failover
description: commands.rs send_fn_box selects lwd_endpoint = DEFAULT_MAINNET_ENDPOINTS[0].to_owned() and calls LightwalletdClient::connect(&endpoint) directly. LightwalletdClient has connect_with_failover() which takes a slice of endpoints — the failover logic exists but is unused for auto-payments. If endpoint[0] is down, every auto-payment fails silently with a Connect error, while manual connect_with_failover would try alternatives. Fix: use connect_with_failover(DEFAULT_MAINNET_ENDPOINTS) instead.
